productDisplayName: Arrow Men Black and Brown Reversible Belt
description: Style NoteYour go-to brand for office essentials, arrow comes up with this stylish belt to add a refined finish to your corporate look. This belt is the right accessory for a formal office-ready look. Product DetailsReversible belt, black on one side an brown on the otherRectangle buckle with engraved branding, has a press-buckle closure with holes to customise the FitBuckle clamped to the belt, can be removed and reversedMaterial and careLeatherWipe with a clean cloth to remove dust
